network_tx.description: High network transmission generates HTTP response logs
network_tx.causal_relationship: Network TX is the result of sending HTTP responses

network_rx.description: High network reception generates HTTP request logs
network_rx.causal_relationship: Network RX is the result of receiving HTTP requests

disk_read.description: High disk read activity generates database query logs
disk_read.causal_relationship: Disk read activity is caused by database query execution

disk_write.description: High disk write activity generates database query logs
disk_write.causal_relationship: Disk write activity is caused by database query execution
